variants: Originally hailing from Palmer's Crossing, Haruto Morita now resides in Everbrook Hollow. His notable invention, the Octave Emission Protocol, received the esteemed Lightward Sapphire Ribbon, signifying his impactful contribution to technology. In addition to his professional accomplishments, Haruto actively participates in the Harlequin Dancers Society, where he embraces the joy of dance as a hobby. His life intertwines scientific achievement and a passion for the performing arts.
